resourcepack.babyzombieaddons.chroma_mod: Makes Aaron Mod's animated chroma fonts work under Modern UI's text engine
config.babyzombieaddons.title: BabyzombieAddons Settings
babyzombieaddons.acceptparty.scheduled_a: §aWill auto-accept the next party invite within 2 minutes
babyzombieaddons.acceptparty.scheduled_p: §aWill auto-accept the next party invite from §6%s §awithin 2 minutes
hud.babyzombieaddons.wumpaRecord.title: §b§lWumpa Record
config.babyzombieaddons.option.partyAlli:
Respond to !allinv in party chat to toggle all-invite.
Regex: ^[!！][ ]?all(?:inv)?(?:ite)?$
config.babyzombieaddons.option.partyInvi:
Respond to !p <name> in party chat to invite a player.
Regex: ^[!！][ ]?p ([a-zA-Z0-9_-]+)$
config.babyzombieaddons.option.partyWarp:
Respond to !warp in party chat to warp the party.
Regex: ^[!！][ ]?wa?r?p?$

Delay warp for N seconds with cancel support.
Cancel Regex: ^[!！][ ]?(?:wa?r?p?)?[ ]?c(?:ancel)?$
How many seconds to wait before warping.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.partyJoin:
Respond to !join f1/m2/t3 to join dungeon/kuudra instances.
Regex: ^[!！][ ]?(?:join)?[ ]?([fmt])([e0-7])$
config.babyzombieaddons.option.partySend:
Respond to !sc in party chat to send your coordinates.
Regex: ^[!！][ ]?(?:s)?(?:end)?[ ]?c(?:oord|oords)?$
config.babyzombieaddons.option.partyPlay:
Respond to !play <content> in party chat to execute /play <content>.
Regex: ^[!！][ ]?play(?: (.+))?$
config.babyzombieaddons.option.partyStre:
Respond to !stream in party chat to execute /stream open/close. Requires leader + MVP++.
Regex: ^[!！][ ]?stream(?:[ ]+(\d+|c(?:lose)?|off))?$
config.babyzombieaddons.option.partyTran:
Respond to !pt or !ptme in party chat to transfer party leader.
Regex: ^[!！][ ]?pt(?:me)?$
config.babyzombieaddons.option.dmPartyIn:
Auto-invite players who send you a DM with !p.
Regex: ^From (.+): [!！][ ]?p(?:arty)?(?: .*)?$
config.babyzombieaddons.option.autoAccep: After the party is disbanded, auto-accept if the disbander re-invites you within 2 minutes.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.partySelf: When enabled, party chat commands sent by yourself will also be executed.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.partyComm: Show enabled party commands as suggestions when typing /pc in chat.
config.babyzombieaddons.category.popup.d: Accept and Ignore keybinds can be changed in the game's Controls settings.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.autotipEn:
Automatically sends /tip all every 20.5 minutes.
Does nothing for MVP++ — MVP++ has built-in autotip.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.autotipHi: Hide the result messages from /tip all.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.petDispla: Show current pet info on HUD.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.petShowIc: Show the pet head icon on the HUD.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.petShowSk: Show the equipped pet skin instead of the default pet appearance on the HUD.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.petMainLi: Choose which info to display below the main pet and their order.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.petShared: Show exp sharing pets below the main pet display.
Choose which info to display below exp sharing pets and their order.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.petHideSh: Don't show in shared section if already the current pet.
config.babyzombieaddons.group.petPageKey: Configure key bindings for the pet page. Only available in config, not registered as vanilla keys.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.petPageKe: Press this key to go to the previous page of pets (default A).
Press this key to go to the next page of pets (default D).
Configure key bindings for the pet page. Only available in config, not registered as vanilla keys.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.updateChe: Check for new versions when joining a world.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.replaceRe: Replaces the "Report Player" button with "Server List" on the pause menu.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.autois.de: When joining SkyBlock, automatically warp to your island or garden.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.autoisDel: How long to wait before warping after joining a world.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.hideEntit: I'm here to AFK, why would I need to see these entities. Only effective when AutoIS is on.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.backOnSer: After being kicked to the Hub by a server restart, automatically warp back to your island. Only takes effect when AutoIS is OFF — if AutoIS is ON, its settings will override this.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.autoBackT: What to do after being kicked.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.cakeBuffT: Show consumed cake checklist on HUD for 30 seconds.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.minionCol: When clicking "Collect All" in a Minion GUI, automatically close the container screen.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.showInvis: Show invisible players' name tags in SkyBlock.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.disableBl: Skips client-side block placement prediction when right-clicking block items. Private Island and regular Garden plots are automatically excluded (greenhouse & barn still apply).
config.babyzombieaddons.option.serverRes: Automatically accept the Hypixel server resource pack without showing the confirmation prompt.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.skipSecon: Skip second-person view when pressing F5, cycling only between first-person and third-person back. Hold longer than the set tick count to switch to second-person. Set to 0 to disable, 20 ticks = 1 second.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.autoRecon: Auto-reconnect after being disconnected from a server.
How many seconds to wait before reconnecting.
Maximum retry attempts after a failed reconnect. Set to 0 for unlimited. Resets on successful join.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.autoJoinS: Automatically connect to the server below when the game launches.
The server IP or hostname to auto-connect to on launch, e.g. mc.hypixel.net.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.useTpsAdj: Use server tick rate to adjust timer speeds. On laggy servers, cooldowns will slow down to match actual game time instead of using real wall-clock time.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.showCross: Show the crosshair in the center of the screen even when in third-person view.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.chatInCon: When opening chests/inventory, press the chat key (default T) to open the real chat screen on top of the container. ESC closes chat but keeps the container. ESC again closes the container.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.playerSca: Only affects how you see your own model. Scale factor on the X (width) axis.
Only affects how you see your own model. Scale factor on the Y (height) axis.
Only affects how you see your own model. Scale factor on the Z (depth) axis.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.playerAlp: Only affects how you see your own model's transparency. 0 = fully transparent, 1 = fully opaque.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.disableHa: Completely disable first-person arm and item rendering.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.swapHands: Swap the rendering position of main hand and off hand. Use the keybind below to toggle at runtime.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.customSwi: Override the arm swing animation duration with the value below.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.swingDura:
Custom arm swing duration in ticks.
0 = no animation, 6 = vanilla default.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.itemScale: Uniform scale for held items and arms.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.itemOffse:
Horizontal offset for the held item.
Positive = right, negative = left.

Vertical offset for the held item.
Positive = down, negative = up.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.handAlpha: Transparency of first-person arms and held items. 0 = fully transparent, 1 = fully opaque.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.renderPha: Controls when boxes, beams, and floating text are rendered.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.f4CrowdHi: Handle spectator crowd in Floor 4 boss room.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.deathMess: What to do when a teammate dies in dungeons.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.muteStorm: Cancel all thunder sounds for 22 seconds after Storm dies.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.muteRareD: Mute RareDrop Sound In Dungeon Hub
Mute the rare drop sound when players open loot chests in the Dungeon Hub.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.dungeonEn: Auto /gfs ender pearl on dungeon start or low count.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.autoChest: Automatically close chest GUIs after looting.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.autoOpenP: Open Potion Bag on Dungeon Entry
Automatically send /pb to open the potion bag when entering a dungeon at or above this floor.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.requeueKu: §7For message/cancel settings, see Dungeon → Requeue Settings
config.babyzombieaddons.option.dungeonRe:
Automatically /instancerequeue after dungeon end.
Use /dt to manually cancel auto requeue.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.kuudraReq:
Automatically /instancerequeue after Kuudra end.
Use /dt to manually cancel auto requeue.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.dungeonRe: How many seconds to wait before requeuing. 0 = instant.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.kuudraReq: How many seconds to wait before requeuing. 0 = instant.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.requeueMe: Party message sent before requeuing. %delay% = wait time.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.requeueCa: Party message sent when auto requeue is cancelled.
Pipe-separated keywords that cancel auto requeue from party chat.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.hpDisplay: Show Kuudra HP on HUD or boss bar.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.phaseTime: Record and display time for each Kuudra phase.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.stunTimer: Stun duration, knockdown, and P4 countdown display.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.supplyBea: Beacon beams on supply crates during Rescue Supplies phase.
Color of the supply crate beacon beams.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.supplyDro: Beacon beams on supply drop-off locations.
Color of the supply drop-off beacon beams.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.ballistaP: Show ballista build progress text above build sites.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.ballistaT: Color of the ballista progress text.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.ballistaB: Beacon beams on ballista build sites during Protect Elle phase.
Color of the ballista build site beacon beams.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.fuelOrbBe: Beacon beams on fuel cell carriers.
Color of the fuel cell beacon beams.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.chuckBeac: Color of the orb beacon beams.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.ballistaP: Show proximity circles at ballista build sites (green when inside, yellow when outside).
config.babyzombieaddons.option.direction: Magma cube icon pointing toward Kuudra in P4.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.toxicArro: Toxic arrow refill only triggers in Kuudra at or above this tier.
When to refill Toxic Arrow Poison. Refill amount is controlled by the threshold option below. 0 = off. Selecting "Kuudra Start" will conflict with Ender Pearl refill.
Target amount of Toxic Arrow Poison to refill to via /gfs when the selected timing triggers. 0 = off.
When fewer than 2 nearby players (within 20 blocks) are holding a Terminator, add this many extra arrows per missing shooter. 0 = off.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.twilightA: When to refill Twilight Arrow Poison (T5 only). Refill amount is controlled by the threshold option below. 0 = off. Selecting "Kuudra Start" will conflict with Ender Pearl refill.
Target amount of Twilight Arrow Poison to refill to via /gfs when the selected timing triggers in T5. 0 = off.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.enderPear: Auto /gfs ender pearl on instance start or low count.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.perkShopB: Prevent accidental purchase of blacklisted Perk Shop items.
Full item names, separated by commas.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.followerH: Calculate today's Kuudra Follower Helmet price.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.muteCrims: Cancel piston sound when Crimson Isle armor stacks are full (10 stacks).
config.babyzombieaddons.option.nopeMagma: Show a title when Elle says "Nope, that's just a Magmafish!".
config.babyzombieaddons.option.etherwarp: Cancel etherwarp teleport if the destination block is lava (Kuudra only).
config.babyzombieaddons.option.pigmanSwo: Show cooldown timer on HUD after Pigman Sword triggers.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.holyIceTi: Show Holy Ice usage timer on HUD in the Rift.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.ragnarock: Show Ragnarock Axe related info in a HUD.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.endStoneS: Show duration and damage resistance %. Can also prevent re-use during active duration.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.bossRespa: Show a title and play a sound when "YOU COCOONED YOUR SLAYER BOSS" appears in chat, indicating the boss has respawned.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.noslayerq: Remind you after failing a quest if you keep killing mobs without taking a new one (requires Champion enchant on weapon).
config.babyzombieaddons.option.reheatedG: Show remaining time of Re-heated Gummy Polar Bear. Alerts at 5min, 2min, 1min left and on expiration.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.boxLowHPB: Mark Bloodfiend bosses below 20% HP with a colored indicator. When this marker appears, you can use Steak Stake to execute.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.showEffig: Show remaining blood pillars in the Rift castle based on scoreboard.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.zombieSla: Show Revenant Horror boss HP and status on HUD.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.spiderSla: Show Tarantula Broodfather boss HP and status on HUD.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.wolfSlaye: Show Sven Packmaster boss HP and status on HUD.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.endermanS: Show Voidgloom Seraph boss HP, lazer timer and beacon status on HUD.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.blazeSlay: Show Inferno Demonlord boss HP, attunement and minion status on HUD.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.vampireSl: Show Riftstalker Bloodfiend boss HP and status on HUD.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.boxSlayer: Draw a bounding box around the slayer boss.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.boxBossCo: Color of the slayer boss bounding box and beam.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.boxBossBe: Draw a beacon beam on the slayer boss and its minions.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.boxBossRe: When enabled, the boss box is visible even behind walls.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.boxBossLi: Line width of the slayer boss wireframe box (1-16). Default: 5.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.witherClo: Track Wither Cloak activation, deactivation, and cooldown.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.alignedTi: Show 6-second alignment duration and source player.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.hideCharg: Hide invisible charged creepers within 2 blocks when Wither Cloak is active.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.jukeboxEn: Auto-play music discs when entering a dungeon, stop when leaving
config.babyzombieaddons.option.jukeboxAu: Send /togglemusic on dungeon enter/leave to toggle SB music
config.babyzombieaddons.option.jukeboxPl:
Single: loop first disc
Sequential: play in order, resume across runs
Random: random, exclude last played
Drag to reorder, add or remove discs
config.babyzombieaddons.option.jukeboxSh: Display the currently playing disc name on screen
config.babyzombieaddons.option.miningAbi: Title/sound alerts when mining abilities are ready or used.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.chestLine: Width of chest marker lines (1-16). Default 3.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.getFromSa: Auto-extract keys, eggs, and apparatus from sacks.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.scathaRel: Release all currently pressed keys when a worm spawns while mining.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.armadillo: Show current/max energy with color transition.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.drillSwin: Prevent arm swinging animation while mining.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.powderMin: Remove XP orb sounds and replace chest sounds.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.jungleTem: When talking to a Kalhuiki Door Guardian, find the thin wall to the treasure room and mark it as a waypoint.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.corleoneT: Shows a 60s floating countdown at the death position of Team Treasurite (Corleone).
config.babyzombieaddons.option.greatGlac: Mark Great Glacite locations in the Glacite area.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.lanternRe: Check for lanterns when entering Glacite Mineshaft and remind to place them.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.mithrilGo: Automatically runs /todonexpresso when a MITHRIL GOURMAND event bossbar reaches the configured countdown threshold. Triggers once per bossbar.
Run /todonexpresso when the Mithril Gourmand event bossbar countdown is at or below this value. Range: 3-20 seconds, step: 1.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.creeperVi: Reveal invisible creepers in The Mist / Gunpowder Mines.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.glaciteMi: Behavior when a portal is found.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.suspiciou: Show suspicious scrap count on HUD.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.pestDispl: Show beacon beams on garden pests.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.xpOrbSoun: XP orb sound volume when breaking crops while holding a farming tool in the Garden. 0 = fully muted, 100 = unchanged.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.signAutoR: Right-click a sign while holding a farming tool to auto-rotate and cancel interaction. Write "yaw: value" and "pitch: value" on any sign line (case-insensitive).
config.babyzombieaddons.option.farmingTo: Prevent arm swinging animation while holding a farming tool in the Garden.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.trevorAut: Automatically accept Trevor the Trapper's hunting task by clicking [YES] for you.
Automatically /call trevor_the_trapper 31 seconds after the hunting task starts, once the previous animal is found.
babyzombieaddons.trevor.auto_call_wait: §eHunting quest is still on cooldown, Trevor will be auto-called when the cooldown ends
babyzombieaddons.trevor.auto_call_disabl: §7Click to disable auto-call until world change
config.babyzombieaddons.option.plotBorde: Renders a world border around the current garden plot and barn area. Visual only, does not block movement.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.greenhous: Prevent breaking crop blocks and attacking armor stand crops in garden greenhouses.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.ghPumpkin: Prevent breaking pumpkin stems and attacking pumpkin armor stands.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.ghMelon.d: Prevent breaking melon stems and attacking melon armor stands.
Prevent breaking cactus blocks and attacking cactus armor stands.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.ghRoseBus: Prevent breaking rose bushes and attacking wild rose armor stands.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.ghSunflow: Prevent breaking sunflowers and attacking sunflower armor stands.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.ghFire.de: Prevent breaking fire and soul fire.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.ghAllInAl: Prevent attacking All-in Aloe armor stands.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.ghChorusF: Prevent attacking Chorus Fruit armor stands.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.ghMagicJe: Prevent attacking Magic Jellybean armor stands.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.ghPlantbo: Prevent attacking PlantBoy Advance armor stands.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.ghStoplig: Prevent attacking Stoplight Petal armor stands.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.popupPart: Show a popup when someone invites you to a party.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.popupGuil: Show a popup for guild-wide party invites.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.popupFrie: Show a popup when someone sends a friend request.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.popupDuel: Show a popup when someone invites you to a duel.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.popupSkyb: Show a popup when someone sends a trade request.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.popupDung: Show a popup when party leader requests a restart.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.popupBait: When right-clicking a fishing rod, checks slot 9 bait quantity. Shows popup if below threshold. 0 = off.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.popupSoun: Sound played when a popup notification appears.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.greatSpoo: Auto-solve QUICK MATHS, respond to Public Speaking Demon, and click HERE buttons.
Add a random half-to-one-second delay so it doesn't look too instant.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.publicSpe: Text to auto-send when the Speaking Demon asks to say something interesting. Leave empty for random text.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.fruitDigg: Mark dug fruit locations and nearby treasure at Carnival.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.carnivalA: Double-click the Carnival minigame NPC on the second+ encounter to auto-accept.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.fruitDigg: Render beacon beams to recommend the best tile to dig. Color indicates dowsing mode (Red=Mines, Gold=Treasure, Blue=Anchor).
config.babyzombieaddons.option.solverBom: Estimated score loss for hitting a bomb. Higher = more conservative.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.solverRum: Estimated score loss for hitting rum.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.solverMin: Info value per adjacent unknown cell when using MINES mode.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.solverTre: Info value per adjacent unknown cell when using TREASURE mode.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.solverAnc: Info value per adjacent unknown cell when using ANCHOR mode.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.solverEar: Extra score bonus for finding Apple in the early game.
Extra score bonus for finding Cherry in the early game.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.solverLat: Last N digs treated as late game phase (prioritize conservative harvesting).
config.babyzombieaddons.option.raffleTas: Track uncompleted Raffle Tasks on HUD. Parses the Raffle Tasks GUI and listens for completion messages.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.bzGetFrom: Auto-extract items from sacks when creating a Bazaar sell offer with "None in inventory!".
config.babyzombieaddons.option.abiphoneG: Replace /call with a graphical contact list.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.fallSound: Adjust your own fall sound (GENERIC_SMALL_FALL / GENERIC_BIG_FALL) volume in SkyBlock. Set to 0 to mute completely.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.playCmd.d: Replace /play with a game mode selection GUI and enable tab completion.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.serverVis: How long a visited server stays in the "already seen" list for /bza findnew. Range: 1–60 minutes, step 2.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.chatChann: Show clickable GC/OC/PC/CC/AC buttons above the chat input to quickly switch Hypixel chat channels.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.raredropM: Open the rare drop blacklist and share list manager.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.configBac: Choose between YACL and MoulConfig rendering for the settings GUI.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.wideMoulC: Expand MoulConfig settings page width to 1.5× for high-resolution displays.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.hudEdit.d: Enter HUD edit mode to drag and resize HUD elements.
playcmd.title: Play
rareropscreen.title: Rare Drop Manager
config.babyzombieaddons.option.debugMode: Show all HUD elements in edit screen (including disabled ones) to help with layout.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.hypixelMo: Shows raw Mod API data in chat when received.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.maxDebugE: Maximum number of entities shown by /bza debug getentity.

§7Click again to restore

slayer.bossRespawnAlert.subtitle: §eYour Slayer Boss has emerged from its cocoon
slayer.noslayerquest.warning: §cYou forgot to take a slayer quest!
babyzombieaddons.waypoint.invalid_coord: §cInvalid coordinate, use an integer or ~ notation

babyzombieaddons.help:
§6§lBabyzombieAddons Commands
§6/bza §7- Open settings GUI
§6/bza play §7- Open game mode menu
§6/bza sc [channel] [suffix] §7- Send your coordinates
§6/bza la [channel] [suffix] §7- Send looked-at coordinates
§6/bza l §7- Go to Limbo
§6/bza wp §7- Waypoint manager, type /bza wp for usage
babyzombieaddons.waypoint.usage:
§6/bza wp add <x> <y> <z> <name> [seconds]  §7- Add at coords
§6/bza wp add here <name> [seconds]      §7- Add at current position
§6/bza wp add looking <name> [seconds]   §7- Add at looking-at position
§6/bza wp delete <name>                  §7- Delete waypoint
§7Seconds: -1 = permanent, 0 = clear on world change, >0 = auto-expire
babyzombieaddons.debug.rank.no_data: §7No rank info received yet (no response from Hypixel Mod API)
babyzombieaddons.find.already_running: §cA find operation is already in progress.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.necronBla: Volume of nearby explosion sounds while holding a Necron's Blade (10%–100%).
Hide nearby large explosion particles while holding a Necron's Blade.
Hide large explosion particles from other players using a Necron's Blade nearby.
Volume of Shadow Warp teleport sounds while holding a Necron's Blade.
Volume of Wither Shield activation sounds while holding a Necron's Blade.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.teleportS: Volume of teleport sounds while holding Aspect of the End / Aspect of the Void.
Volume of Etherwarp sounds while holding Aspect of the End / Aspect of the Void.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.windowTit: Show custom information (memory, ping, location) in the game window title.
When on Hypixel, replace the original title with a "Hypixel" prefix. Requires "Show Location" to be enabled.
How often to refresh the window title (1 = every frame, 20 = once per second).
Display current location in the title (Limbo / Lobby / Server Type - Map). Enable the "Replace with Hypixel" sub-option below for a cleaner look.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.showClick: When hovering over clickable text in chat, show what it does (run command, open URL, copy text, etc.).
config.babyzombieaddons.option.rareSeaCr: Title Alert for Nearby Rare Sea Creatures
Show a title with the creature name when rare sea creatures are nearby.
When enabled, repeat Title alerts for nearby rare sea creatures with a cooldown. When disabled, each entity only alerts once.
Scan radius for rare sea creatures (1–25 blocks).
When enabled, disables highlight and title alert for the selected sea creatures below.
config.babyzombieaddons.group.rareSeaCre: Select sea creatures to exclude from highlight and title alerts.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.rareSeaCr: Disable Water Hydra highlight and alert.
Disable Abyssal Miner highlight and alert.
Disable The Loch Emperor highlight and alert.
Disable Puddle Jumper highlight and alert.
Disable Frog Prince highlight and alert.
Disable Giant Isopod highlight and alert.
Disable Blue Ringed Octopus highlight and alert.
Disable Wiki Tiki highlight and alert.
Disable Phantom Fisher highlight and alert.
Disable Grim Reaper highlight and alert.
Disable Great White Shark highlight and alert.
Disable Lord Jawbus highlight and alert.
Disable Fiery Scuttler highlight and alert.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.preventIn: Cancel right-click reel within this many milliseconds after casting (50–500, step 25).
fishing.rareSeaCreaturesAlert.title: §bRare Sea Creature
config.babyzombieaddons.option.safariBel: Show rainbow-colored beacon beams at bell locations in the Safari zone.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.safariShu: Highlight all shulkers in the Safari zone with a custom colour.
Custom colour for the shulker glow effect. Default cyan.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.safariHid: Highlight the Hideyho NPC in the Safari zone.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.safariScu: Mark Calibrated Sculk Sensors near Warden
Highlight all calibrated sculk sensors in the Warden zone.
Custom colour for the calibrated sculk sensor glow effect. Default purple.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.safariWar: Highlight the Warden inside its fighting arena. Red during capture cooldown, green when ready.
Glow colour when the Warden is on capture cooldown. Default red.
Glow colour when the Warden is ready to capture. Default green.
Ticks after spawn before the Warden is considered catchable. Latency compensated automatically. Always shows red during emergence animation. Default 140.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.safariWum: Display creature capture progress on HUD in the snow area. Wumpa only spawns after catching all 7 snow creatures.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.beeheemot: How to mark the beeheemoth (scale 9.0 bee) in the Torrhus Canyon area.
Custom colour for the glow and beacon beam. Default purple.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.templePuz: Show puzzle helpers in the Torrhus Canyon underground temple. Puzzle 1 highlights the button to press, Puzzle 2 shows correct statue directions.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.loadoutGu: Replace Hypixel's vanilla Loadout chest page with a custom screen showing player / armor stand models. §cRequires Skyblocker.§r
config.babyzombieaddons.option.loadoutEn: Entity type rendered in each preset cell.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.loadoutAu: Close the page automatically after clicking a preset.
config.babyzombieaddons.group.loadoutKey: Keyboard shortcuts for the Loadout display screen.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.loadoutKe: Key to switch to this loadout preset.
Key to go to the previous page of loadouts.
Key to go to the next page of loadouts.
Key to close the loadout screen (ESC always works).
config.babyzombieaddons.option.cancelKey: Hold to prevent key-release events on other keys.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.secondPer: Hold to temporarily switch to front-facing camera.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.toggleHan: Press to directly toggle the "Swap Hands" setting above.
Press to accept the current popup notification.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.popupNo.d: Press to dismiss the current popup notification.
config.babyzombieaddons.option.copyItemI: Press while hovering an item in a container to copy its NBT/ID.
